title: Skyscraper's Platform, Extensions, Aliases and Scraper definition format (PEAS), extended with RetroArch information

aliases.description: Alias(es) of a platform for scraping modules that do not use a platform id. They use the defined alias(es) for a platform match.

formats.description: Recognized gamefile extensions, lowercase, unique. Define extension beginning with '*.'.

retroarch_dbname.description: Hint for RetroArch frontend which database to lookup for metadata.
